title: Harmoniously Optimized
description: A mod pack focused on making your minecraft as optimized as possible.
body:
# What is this

Harmoniously Optimized is the essential mod designed specifically for Minecraft within Modirinth, dedicated to refining the game's performance and boosting FPS for a smoother, more enjoyable gaming experience.

# Features

- Chunk Loading Optimazition

- Entity Culling

- Better Performance Textures

# Mods

- Adaptive View:
Changes the render distance depending on fps

- Clumps:
Converts multiple xp orbs into one big xp orb

- Concurrent Chunk Management:
Designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.

- Dynamic FPS:
Dynamic FPS will detect whether the Minecraft window is currently active, being hovered over, unfocused, or invisible. When the window isnt active the fps is capped at 30 fps.

- Embeddium:
Better Sodium Mod

- Entity Culling:
Entity Culling idk tbh

- Iris Shaders:
Shader Mod that adds shaders to sodium or in this case embeddium

- Mod Menu:
A menu where you can manage your mods

- Modern Fix:
Bugfixes for minecraft

- More Culling:
More Culling

- Noxesium:
Bug Fixes, Better Performance

- Optimized Models:
3D things are more optimized resulting in more fps

- Perfect Accuracy (doesnt work on servers):
Makes arrows hit the aim block in the middle

- Sodium Extra:
More Features for embeddium

- Vanilla Config:
Config API for minecraft

- Very Many Players:
Improves Performance at lots of players

- Spark:
Performance profiler
